summary: Surah Al-Hashr recounts the expulsion of the disbelievers among the People of the Book and the lessons from their fate. It details the distribution of war booty, the virtues of the Muhajirun and Ansar, and encourages selflessness and unity. The surah warns against hypocrisy, describes the consequences of forgetting Allah, and exalts Allah’s names and attributes, emphasizing His power, wisdom, and mercy.
